snippet.title: GUILTY GEAR -STRIVE- | Season 5 and 2.0 Update Trailer
snippet.description:
Details for the major update "Ver. 2.00," "Season Pass 5," and the newly participating character "Jam Kuradoberi" were announced at the "ARC WORLD TOUR 2025-2026 FINALS" held in South Korea.

Ver. 2.00 will feature comprehensive battle balance adjustments, the addition of new special moves for select characters, and the introduction of a new "Counter Blitz" mechanic. Furthermore, players can look forward to the "Blazing Pass" system, allowing them to earn in-game rewards based on their in-game progression.

■Official website: https://www.guiltygear.com/ggst/en/
GUILTY GEAR : the next entry to the series

■GUILTY GEAR Official X
https://twitter.com/GUILTYGEAR_PR

■The fate of the universe will be determined...
The story of Guilty Gear, spanning over 25 years, will finally come to a conclusion in “GUILTY GEAR -STRIVE-." The trials and tribulations of the series’ heroes and villains will finally be resolved. Discover the astonishing truth awaiting at the end of all things.
Check out the play style of the third character in Season Pass 4, Unika, in this trailer.

■Buy now!
https://www.guiltygear.com/ggst/en/buynow/

snippet.title: CG5 × Pomni - Lover Without A Heart [Ode to CAINE] (The Amazing Digital Circus Song Animation)
snippet.description:
STREAM NOW: https://cg5.lnk.to/loverwithoutaheart

Song by @CG5
Vocals by @CG5 & @LizzieRFreeman
Visuals by @CodaAnim

Follow CG5's social media:
Twitter ▶ http://twitter.com/cg5beats
Twitch ▶ https://www.twitch.tv/cg5music
Spotify ▶ https://sptfy.com/cg5_
Instagram ▶ http://www.instagram.com/cg5beats/

Follow @cg5live105, @cg5instrumentals461, & @cg5covers107
Discord Server ▶ https://discord.gg/CG5

LYRICS: 

Poor poor ringleader,
With the porcelain grin.
Controls a circus,
But he can’t control the kin.

So the spotlight flickers,
And the illusion breaks apart.
But this universe was broken from the start.
In the center of the ring, he says:

“I can fix this, Bubble, it’s like a puzzle.
A problem I need to solve.
I’ll pick up my mess, don’t you move a muscle,
It will be resolved.
Please, please, don’t leave me,
I’ll make life easy,
It’s like you’ll be at home.
Mi casa, su casa,
So don’t leave me alone.
Please?"

He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without a heart.
He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without a heart.
He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without no heart.
A lover, a lover,
A lover-love, without a heart.

Running through this server storm, 
Gotta grit your teeth while the master performs his show.
Taken through hell and back,
Disguised as a digital, colorful, delightful dome.
Gli-gli-glitches getting quicker,
Cuz tooth-face got no tick-tick-ticker.
Why does this computer need friends?
In the center of the ring, he says…

“I can put it all together, I can make it all whatever
I want, so why don’t you care?
Can’t you just play along,
Nothing ever goes wrong.
Anything can be repaired.
Please, please, don’t leave me,
I’ll make life easy,
It’s like you’ll be at home.
Mi casa, su casa,
So don’t leave me alone."

Don’t leave me,
Don’t leave me alone.
I said, don’t leave me.
This show must go on.
Listen, don’t leave me,
Don’t leave me alone.
I said, don’t leave me.
Let’s get this show on the road.

He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without a heart.
He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without a heart.
He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without no heart.
A lover, a lover,
A lover-love, without a heart.

He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without a heart.
He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without a heart.
He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without no heart.
A lover, a lover,
A lover-love, without a heart.

snippet.description:

It’s time for Minecraft LIVE again! Kick things off with a fun-packed community pre-show, get the scoop on upcoming game drops from our developers, go behind the scenes, meet awesome guests, and discover exciting stuff to come. Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

Припев

В живота има бедни и богати 
Има много шматки има и тарикати 
Знам добре пораснах в крайните квартали 
Помня ясно за какво сме си мечтали 

Куплет 1

Не ми обяснявай за кеш изкарал съм го с много труд и под 
И всяко едно постижение струва ми скъпо в тоя живот 
Гледаш червено ферари пред вкъщи и казваш - мафиот 
Абе ей идиот живота ми не е на автопилот 

Тръгнах от нулата знам че боли да избухнеш и да си добре
Ако ада има 9 кръга аз ги преминах брат и деветте 
Недей да ме мразиш че купил съм на жена си чисто ново Порше 
Но жена ми като нямах нищо във мене повярва и в мен се закле 

Сутринта излизам с АМГ 63
На обяд съм със Континентал Бентли 
Вечерта със компетишъна ми М3
Отгоре до долу облечен съм във фенди

Втори куплет:

Много мизерия много уроци научих за мойте години 
За имоти, пари и коли, прескачат се даже и кръвни роднини 
Живота направи ме вълк но аз не желая да съм като тях 
Защото нямах нищо и нищо на никой не съм взел на тоя свят 

Вървя през тунелите тъмни нагоре катерех и планините 
Нито веднъж на приятелите ми не съм им заглеждал жените 
Искам едно да ти кажа и чуй го внимателно и запомни го
1+1 е равно на 2 но ти избра ножа и във гърба ми заби го 

Предателите нямат място на масата 
Нямат място и до мен в S класата
Хейтъра си го изяжда омразата 
Не ме сравнявай с тях, че тук я няма базата

Припев

В живота има бедни и богати 
Има много шматки има и тарикати 
Знам добре пораснах в крайните квартали 
Помня ясно за какво сме си мечтали 

Куплет 1

Не ми обяснявай за кеш изкарал съм го с много труд и под 
И всяко едно постижение струва ми скъпо в тоя живот 
Гледаш червено ферари пред вкъщи и казваш - мафиот 
Абе ей идиот живота ми не е на автопилот 

Тръгнах от нулата знам че боли да избухнеш и да си добре
Ако ада има 9 кръга аз ги преминах брат и деветте 
Недей да ме мразиш че купил съм на жена си чисто ново Порше 
Но жена ми като нямах нищо във мене повярва и в мен се закле 

Сутринта излизам с АМГ 63
На обяд съм със Континентал Бентли 
Вечерта със компетишъна ми М3
Отгоре до долу облечен съм във фенди

Втори куплет:

Много мизерия много уроци научих за мойте години 
За имоти, пари и коли, прескачат се даже и кръвни роднини 
Живота направи ме вълк но аз не желая да съм като тях 
Защото нямах нищо и нищо на никой не съм взел на тоя свят 

Вървя през тунелите тъмни нагоре катерех и планините 
Нито веднъж на приятелите ми не съм им заглеждал жените 
Искам едно да ти кажа и чуй го внимателно и запомни го
1+1 е равно на 2 но ти избра ножа и във гърба ми заби го 

Предателите нямат място на масата 
Нямат място и до мен в S класата
Хейтъра си го изяжда омразата 
Не ме сравнявай с тях, че тук я няма базата

About Creedence Clearwater Revival: 
Creedence Clearwater Revival’s 1968 self-titled debut album introduced the world to guitar-playing brothers John and Tom Fogerty, drummer Doug Clifford, and bassist Stu Cook, four young men out of El Cerrito in the San Francisco Bay Area. Though they emerged in a place and time where trippy psychedelic visions were the order of the day, CCR bucked the trends and instead tapped into a rich, traditional seam of American music that connected to blues, country, rockabilly, gospel, folk and R&B.    

During their short time together as a band (1968 – 1972), the band enjoyed an unparalleled period of creativity lead by singer, songwriter, arranger John Fogerty. They’ve sold close to 100 million records, releasing 14 Top 10 hits. They also managed to play over 150 tour dates around the world, including a headlining spot at Woodstock.

Creedence Clearwater Revival’s canon has become a part of the Great American Songbook. Fogerty penned songs like “Bad Moon Rising,” “Down on the Corner,” “Fortunate Son,” “Have You Ever Seen the Rain,” “Proud Mary,” “Born on the Bayou,” “Travelin’ Band” and “Up Around the Bend” have been ingrained into pop culture — not just as rock staples, but as classic standards.

With so many memorable songs that continue to grace our radio waves, television and movie screens, plus lyrics that still resonate today, Creedence Clearwater Revival is, truly, America’s greatest rock ’n’ roll band.

#creedenceclearwaterrevival #ccr #lyrics

snippet.title: Keep It Chavy !
snippet.description:
Straight out the Yorkshire council estates, KEEP IT CHAVY is a raw, unapologetic anthem from MC INNES & RD WESTYORKS. 🇬🇧🔥
This track celebrates the real side of estate life — tracksuits, late-night link-ups, corner shop runs and the pride of growing up where loyalty and graft mean everything.

With gritty bars, northern attitude and a beat that hits hard, KEEP IT CHAVY reps the culture that raised us. No pretending, no switching up — just proper Yorkshire energy and council estate spirit.
